phrases.intent_en: Ask where the almond tart is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a torta de amêndoa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH TAW-ruh-tuh DIH uh-MAYNG-doouh?
phrases.cultural_note: Almond tarts are a staple of Tavira's pastry tradition, often kept at eye level for easy selection.

likely_response.local: Está na vitrine dos pastéis conventuais.
likely_response.pronunciation: ehs-TAH NUH veet-REE-nih DOOSH puhsh-TEHEESH koong-vayng-TOOEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: It is in the conventual pastry display.

responses.english: It is in the conventual pastry display.
responses.phonetic: ehs-TAH NUH veet-REE-nih DOOSH puhsh-TEHEESH koong-vayng-TOOEYESH.
responses.french: Está na vitrine dos pastéis conventuais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Queijadas de Tavira are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as queijadas de Tavira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH kay-ZHAH-duhsh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Queijadas are a historic Algarve specialty, traditionally displayed prominently to highlight local convent recipes.

likely_response.local: Estão no expositor de pastelaria conventual.
likely_response.pronunciation: ihsh-TOWN NOO ehsh-poo-zee-TOHR DIH puhsh-tih-luh-REEUH koong-vayng-TOOAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: They are in the conventual pastry display.

responses.english: They are in the conventual pastry display.
responses.phonetic: ihsh-TOWN NOO ehsh-poo-zee-TOHR DIH puhsh-tih-luh-REEUH koong-vayng-TOOAHL.
responses.french: Estão no expositor de pastelaria conventual.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the almond tart is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a Torta de Amêndoa de Tavira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH TAW-ruh-tuh DIH uh-MAYNG-doouh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Torta de Amêndoa de Tavira is a traditional almond tart from Tavira, often displayed among conventual pastries.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está na montra de pastéis conventuais.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH MOHNGT-ruh DIH puhsh-TEHEESH koong-vayng-TOOEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's in the conventual pastry display.

responses.english: Good morning, it's in the conventual pastry display.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH MOHNGT-ruh DIH puhsh-TEHEESH koong-vayng-TOOEYESH.
responses.french: Bom dia, está na montra de pastéis conventuais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the back dining room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de jantar dos fundos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH zhahnng-TAHR DOOSH FOONNG-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional pastelarias reserve rear rooms for relaxed seating, separating quick takeaway from dine-in service.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no fundo da loja.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO FOONNG-doo DUH LAW-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the back of the shop.

responses.english: Good morning, at the back of the shop.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO FOONNG-doo DUH LAW-zhuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no fundo da loja.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a vitrine de doces conventuais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH veet-REE-nih DIH DOH-sihsh koong-vayng-TOOEYESH?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Tavira queijadas are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as queijadas de Tavira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH kay-ZHAH-duhsh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Local queijadas are prized for their egg-yolk richness, typically arranged separately to prevent crumbling.

likely_response.local: Estão na montra de pastelaria conventual.
likely_response.pronunciation: ihsh-TOWN NUH MOHNGT-ruh DIH puhsh-tih-luh-REEUH koong-vayng-TOOAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: They are in the conventual pastry display.

responses.english: They are in the conventual pastry display.
responses.phonetic: ihsh-TOWN NUH MOHNGT-ruh DIH puhsh-tih-luh-REEUH koong-vayng-TOOAHL.
responses.french: Estão na montra de pastelaria conventual.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the conventual pastries are
phrases.cultural_note: Conventual sweets originate from Algarve monasteries, often grouped together to honor their monastic heritage.

likely_response.local: Os doces conventuais estão no expositor próprio.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH DOH-sihsh koong-vayng-TOOEYESH ihsh-TOWN NOO ehsh-poo-zee-TOHR PRAWPR-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: The conventual pastries are in their dedicated display.

responses.english: The conventual pastries are in their dedicated display.
responses.phonetic: OOSH DOH-sihsh koong-vayng-TOOEYESH ihsh-TOWN NOO ehsh-poo-zee-TOHR PRAWPR-yoo.
responses.french: Os doces conventuais estão no expositor próprio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay with card
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese bakeries centralize card payments at the main register for security and efficiency.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the main checkout.

responses.english: Good morning, at the main checkout.
